name: Immomio
description: Rental-tenant SaaS with API for property-management integrations.

seo.title: Immomio — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Immomio: Rental-tenant SaaS with API for property-management integrations.

when_to_use: Property management SaaS integration via API
Tenant screening workflow automation for landlords
Digital rental process from listing to contract signing
API connector for real estate ERP and PMS integration
Automated rent application and tenant communication

review.verdict: Niche rental-SaaS API that solves DACH property workflows but offers little outside that region.
review.best_for: German property managers integrating tenant workflows
review.not_for: Global real-estate platforms or US rental markets

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
